title: Password Hash
description: Create a secure hash of a password string using password_hash().
problemStatement:
Security first! Write a one-liner to hash the password `"secret123"` using the default PHP hashing algorithm (`PASSWORD_DEFAULT`). Print the hash.

**Requirement:** Use the `password_hash()` function.
hints: Never store passwords in plain text! Always use hashing.
expectedOutput: A long, secure hash string (starts with $2y$)
